name: ate-rag-kb
description: ATE KB Router — routes ATE engineering questions to a local ate_kb MCP knowledge base for cited answers over Advantest V93000/SMT7 and Teradyne J750/IG-XL documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Route ATE questions to ate_kb MCP first
interface.longDescription: ATE KB Router installs guidance and a portable MCP server configuration so Codex can answer ATE engineering questions through the local ate_kb MCP knowledge base before web or shell fallbacks. It targets Advantest V93000/SMT7 and Teradyne J750/IG-XL documentation, including pin configuration, timing sets, levels, patterns, DPS, PMU, test flow, tester behavior, command syntax, and API references.
defaultPrompt: Use ATE KB to answer a SmarTest question.
Check whether ate_kb MCP is available.
